data.body:
## TDD Requirement

Write failing tests (RED state) for sprint-next-batch.sh v2 removal. These tests must FAIL on the current codebase.

## Implementation Steps

1. Add new test functions to tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh:
   - test_sprint_next_batch_no_v2_elif_branch: assert grep -q 'elif \[ -d "$TICKETS_DIR' plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh exits non-zero (the v2 DESCEOF block)
   - test_sprint_next_batch_no_TICKETS_DIR_variable: assert grep -q '^TICKETS_DIR=' plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh exits non-zero (the standalone TICKETS_DIR assignment at line 196)
   - test_sprint_next_batch_no_v2_ticket_body_fallback: assert grep -q '.tickets/\$ticket_id' plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh exits non-zero
   - test_sprint_next_batch_no_tk_ready_call: assert grep -q '"\" ready' plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh exits non-zero
   - test_sprint_next_batch_no_TK_variable: assert grep -q '^TK=' plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-next-batch.sh exits non-zero

2. Verify each test fails (RED state).

## Test File Notes
- Existing test file: tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh
- Source: sprint-next-batch.sh → fuzzy: sprintnextbatchsh — substring of testsprintnextbatchsh. Fuzzy match OK.

## Files Modified
- tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh (Edit — append test functions)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test_sprint_next_batch_no_v2_elif_branch function exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_sprint_next_batch_no_v2_elif_branch' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh
- [ ] test_sprint_next_batch_no_TK_variable function exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_sprint_next_batch_no_TK_variable' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh
- [ ] Tests FAIL on current codebase (RED state)
  Verify: { bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL'; }
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — existing tests still pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
